body.title: Wire scheduler.tick() into NE cycle + idle slot
body.result: 9deb6cc0 — scheduler.tick() called in NE worker (after ne.run) and boredom_idle (after cascade, before wonder). Experiments now have a heartbeat.
body.description: Call ExperimentScheduler.tick() from NE cycle (each pass checks for queued experiments) and from boredom_idle (idle time = experiment time). Sleep consolidation can also drain the queue. Tick is already single-experiment, safe to call frequently.
